import re, unicodedata

# Arabic diacritics
ARABIC_DIACRITICS = re.compile(r"[\u0610-\u061A\u064B-\u065F\u06D6-\u06ED]")
TATWEEL = "\u0640"

def normalize_arabic(s):
    if not isinstance(s,str):
        return s
    s = s.replace(TATWEEL,"")
    s = ARABIC_DIACRITICS.sub("", s)
    # unify hamza/ya/alif variants
    s = s.replace("أ","ا").replace("إ","ا").replace("آ","ا")
    s = s.replace("ى","ي").replace("ي","ي")
    s = s.replace("ؤ","و").replace("ئ","ي").replace("ة","ه")
    # remove punctuation and non-letters/digits spaces
    s = re.sub(r"[^\u0600-\u06FF0-9\s]", " ", s)
    s = re.sub(r"\s+", " ", s).strip()
    return s

def lcs_length(a,b):
    # normalized
    A=a.split()
    B=b.split()
    # simple token LCS dynamic programming
    n,m=len(A),len(B)
    dp=[[0]*(m+1) for _ in range(n+1)]
    for i in range(n):
        for j in range(m):
            dp[i+1][j+1] = dp[i][j]+1 if A[i]==B[j] else max(dp[i+1][j],dp[i][j+1])
    return dp[n][m]

def token_f1(a,b):
    A=a.split()
    B=b.split()
    setA=set(A)
    setB=set(B)
    inter=len(setA & setB)
    if inter==0:
        prec=rec=f1=0.0
    else:
        prec=inter/len(setA) if setA else 0.0
        rec=inter/len(setB) if setB else 0.0
        if prec+rec==0:
            f1=0.0
        else:
            f1=2*prec*rec/(prec+rec)
    return inter,prec,rec,f1

def ratio(a,b):
    return difflib.SequenceMatcher(None,a,b).ratio()

# load normalized corpus lists
quran_texts=[q['ayah_text'] for q in quran]
quran_norm=[normalize_arabic(t) for t in quran_texts]

def similarity_metrics(a,b):
    # a: original normalized span ; b: candidate normalized text 
    # We'll compute: 
    # - SequenceMatcher ratio on strings
    # - token F1
    # - LCS length / max len
    ra=ratio(a,b)
    inter,prec,rec,f1=token_f1(a,b)
    lcs_len=lcs_length(a,b)
    lcs_ratio=lcs_len/max(len(a.split()),len(b.split()))
    return dict(ratio=ra, f1=f1, lcs_ratio=lcs_ratio, inter_tokens=inter, prec=prec, rec=rec)

for i in matches:
    cand=quran_texts[i]
    print(i, quran[i]['surah_name'], quran[i]['ayah_id'], similarity_metrics(norm_span, quran_norm[i]))

SUPERSCRIPT_ALEF = "\u0670"
def normalize_arabic2(s):
    if not isinstance(s,str):
        return s
    s = s.replace(TATWEEL,"")
    s = ARABIC_DIACRITICS.sub("", s)
    s = s.replace(SUPERSCRIPT_ALEF, "")
    s = s.replace("أ","ا").replace("إ","ا").replace("آ","ا")
    s = s.replace("ى","ي").replace("ي","ي")
    s = s.replace("ؤ","و").replace("ئ","ي").replace("ة","ه")
    s = re.sub(r"[^\u0600-\u06FF0-9\s]", " ", s)
    s = re.sub(r"\s+", " ", s).strip()
    return s
